memo: DeepScientist implements a Bayesian-Optimization-style discovery loop. Evaluation mechanisms visible in the packet: (1) a Findings Memory combining frontier human knowledge and the system's own historical findings that guides subsequent exploration (E01); (2) a UCB acquisition step that scores and selects the most promising record for deeper validation (E02), with a validated record written back into the knowledge base so it conditions all later cycles (E03); (3) a two-track output assessment — DeepReviewer, an automated peer-review simulator with external search benchmarked against 28 papers from other AI Scientist systems, plus a three-person human program committee of ICLR reviewers/AC (E04); (4) a secondary verification step in which DeepScientist re-executes the main script after the coding agent reports completion (E07). Outputs feed forward: selection gates which of ~5,000 ideas reach the ~1,100 validated and 21 progress-yielding tier (E05), and validated records alter later acquisition decisions (E03). Key risks: the pipeline is not autonomous — three human experts supervise, verify outputs, and filter hallucinations (E06), and all experimental results were manually inspected (E07), so reported reliability is confounded with human oversight; the implementation agent showed ~50% false-positive completion due to internal timeouts (E07), a reported failure whose residual rate after re-execution is not quantified in the packet. Independent replication, calibration of surrogate reviewer scores, preregistration, and head-to-head human comparison are not present in these excerpts and cannot be asserted either way. Robotics/physical-science work is stated only as future work (E08).

diagnostics.statement: The implementation stage exhibited a high reported false-positive completion rate: roughly half of initial implementation attempts failed to complete due to agent internal timeouts, and this was only caught by a secondary re-execution check.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This measure was implemented to counteract a high rate of false positives-we observed that approximately 50% of initial implementation attempts failed to complete fully due to internal timeouts within the Claude Code agent.

diagnostics.consequence: Unverified completion claims can propagate corrupted or absent results into the UCB selection and Findings Memory, contaminating downstream cycle decisions; the packet does not report the residual false-positive rate after re-execution.

diagnostics.statement: Reported autonomy is confounded with continuous human oversight: three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter hallucinations, and all experimental results were manually inspected.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter out hallucinations.
Throughout this project, all experimental results were manually inspected by human supervisors to guarantee their authenticity.

diagnostics.consequence: The system boundary between automated evaluation and human gatekeeping is unclear, so measured discovery yield cannot be attributed to the automated mechanisms alone.

diagnostics.statement: Final-output quality is judged by an automated reviewer agent and a three-person committee, but the packet reports no calibration, blinding, or independent replication of either judgment, while the selection funnel is extremely lossy (over 5,000 ideas to 21 outcomes).

exact_quotes.exact_quote: we employ DeepReviewer (Zhu et al., 2025a), an AI agent that simulates the human peer-review process with an external search capability, comparing DeepScientist's output against 28 publicly available papers from other AI Scientist systems

DeepScientist generate over 5,000 unique ideas, yet only about 1,100 are deemed worthy of experimental validation by the system's selection mechanism, and a mere 21 ultimately result in scientific progress

diagnostics.consequence: Evaluator error or bias in DeepReviewer or the small committee could inflate or deflate the reported 21 progress events without detection, and the acceptance rate of the selection mechanism cannot be audited.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: A critical step in our pipeline is a secondary verification process: after Claude Code reports completion, DeepScientist independently re-executes the main script via the command line.
This deeply validated record becomes a new record in the system's knowledge base, thus influencing the decision-making process in all subsequent cycles.

success_check.observable: Residual rate of falsely-reported-complete implementations that survive secondary re-execution and are written into the knowledge base
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Reported and materially below the stated ~50% pre-check rate, with an explicit measured post-check percentage
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-attempt logs of agent completion claims versus independent re-execution outcomes, and the count of records admitted to the knowledge base after verification

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter out hallucinations.
Throughout this project, all experimental results were manually inspected by human supervisors to guarantee their authenticity.

success_check.observable: Documented specification of which pipeline steps are automated versus human-gated, including the volume of items humans rejected or corrected
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every reported outcome stage is labeled automated or human-gated, with counts of human interventions reported for each stage
success_check.evidence_needed: An intervention log tying each human verification or hallucination filter action to a specific pipeline stage and item

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Second, for a more rigorous assessment, we convene a dedicated program committee consisting of three active LLM researchers: two volunteers who have served as ICLR reviewers and one senior volunteer who has been invited to be an ICLR Area Chair.
only about 1,100 are deemed worthy of experimental validation by the system's selection mechanism, and a mere 21 ultimately result in scientific progress

success_check.observable: Agreement and bias analysis between DeepReviewer scores and the human committee's judgments on the same blinded outputs
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Inter-rater agreement statistic reported with authorship/source blinding, plus reported disagreement cases on the 21 progress claims
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-paper scores from both evaluators under blinding, and the blinding protocol description
